subcodes.first_line: O accomplished and consummate one! Thy letter hath been received, and its contents were known beforehand. The truth lieth with thee; thus it is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فاضل کامل تحریر آنجناب رسید و مضمون از پیش معلوم بود حق با شماست چنین است
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @love of God, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
